content:
# M3.3: Embedding & Chunking Strategy Implementation Plan

## Pre-Existing Foundations

These are already built and should NOT be recreated:

| File | What's there |
|------|-------------|
| `crates/corvia-kernel/src/chunking_strategy.rs` | `ChunkingStrategy` trait, `RawChunk`, `ProcessedChunk`, `SourceFile`, `ChunkMetadata`, `ProcessingInfo`, `SourceMetadata` |
| `crates/corvia-kernel/src/token_estimator.rs` | `TokenEstimator` trait, `CharDivFourEstimator` |
| `crates/corvia-common/src/config.rs` | `ChunkingConfig` (max_tokens=512, min_tokens=32, overlap_tokens=64, strategy="auto") |
| `crates/corvia-kernel/src/lib.rs:84` | `pub mod chunking_strategy;` already declared |

---
